TeacherModules.Title: Student Academic View
TeacherModules.Description: Everything available to students, including timetable, curriculum, content, assignments, and progress.

TeacherModules.Title: Attendance Management
TeacherModules.Description: Mark daily attendance, update late entries, approve corrections, and notify parents.

TeacherModules.Title: Academic Content Admin
TeacherModules.Description: Create and maintain lesson plans, curriculum units, study material, homework, and exam schedules.

TeacherModules.Title: Student Records
TeacherModules.Description: Maintain profiles, guardian contacts, health notes, fee status visibility, and progress records.

TeacherModules.Title: School Management
TeacherModules.Description: Operational tasks for notices, circulars, events, transport coordination, staff communication, and maintenance requests.

TeacherModules.Title: Administration Reports
TeacherModules.Description: Class summaries, attendance trends, academic progress, fee follow-up lists, and management dashboards.
